meta.question: What are all the tasks defined in this model? (Model ID: 1c273a0818b146269ac04f6b8d518698)
meta.finalAnswer:
This model (ID: 1c273a0818b146269ac04f6b8d518698) defines 8 choreography tasks:

1) Ask for renting a device — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-7824747F-0FC1-4AA7-8094-EB8F8FBE5A33
2) Redirect to external payment system — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-CB937C31-7F05-4150-A941-EBD1FD49C3E6
3) Send back the rented device — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-48DC1840-17C8-4EC7-8656-F4C518692EF8
4) Send device's results — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-889C3847-8395-4C72-9D49-376DCE161E65
5) Send medical device — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-A35D6AC5-0A4F-455A-837E-3CDE9B8035D7
6) Send the diagnose to the customer — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-1FE35DAE-860E-4D16-8780-3E9FF21C4D88
7) Send the results to the doctor and get back the diagnose — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-9AB6D3D5-7399-49F8-841A-6FE4D36830D1
8) Transaction — https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-783C417F-8840-4577-BC62-57571B37D1C4

All 8 tasks belong to the same choreography: https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid_456ee830_bc3c_4f84_8cf1_387f05f0eb06.

request.message: The query returned no tasks for the given model normalized ID, suggesting the ID might be stored under a different property (e.g., tai:originalId) or the model identifier formatting differs. Also, it’s possible tasks are linked via a different containment path (e.g., directly tai:belongsTo ?choreo without the intermediate definitions).
request.reason: Try matching the provided value against both tai:normalizedId and tai:originalId, and loosen containment traversal by finding choreographies belonging to the model first and then tasks belonging to those choreographies. This should recover tasks even if the model ID property differs.

request.message: The query successfully found 8 tasks contained in choreographies that belong to the specified model identifier (matched against both tai:normalizedId and tai:originalId). The results include task names, task URIs, and the corresponding choreography/model context.
